voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Cường xoay câu hỏi trong đầu, xoay như cuộn cáp trong tay lúc nãy, kiểm tra mọi góc độ.
voice_adherence.fix: Cut the simile. The voice profile demands action sentences be 'gọn, trần trụi, không tính từ.' Replace with: 'Cường xoay câu hỏi trong đầu. Kiểm tra mọi góc độ. Độ trễ: 14ms. Băng thông: đủ. Nhiễu: trong giới hạn.'
voice_adherence.note: The chapter largely nails the clinical, fragmented tone. The oscillation between short action beats and longer sensory descriptions works well. The weakest moment is a single simile that breaks the 'no adjective' rule for action sentences.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: The 'Save the Cat' beat (Theme stated) is implicit rather than dramatized. The theme of memory vs. data is present but never spoken aloud as a thematic statement.
beat_coverage.fix: Have Bảo or Hạnh deliver a line that explicitly states the chapter's theme. Bảo's warning could be sharpened: 'Mày đếm được mọi thứ, nhưng mày không đếm được cái gì đang đếm mày.'
beat_coverage.note: All three plot beats (breakfast, meeting Bảo, encountering Hạnh) are fully dramatized in-scene rather than summarized. The emotional arc (Vô cảm → Bối rối → Phòng thủ) tracks perfectly.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Bảo's line 'Mày đổ bộ bao nhiêu lần rồi.' reads as a statement, but the context implies it's a question seeking information, which slightly blurs his 'doesn't want to know' profile.
character_voice.fix: Rephrase to make it clearly a rhetorical confirmation: 'Tám trăm bốn mươi bảy. Mày vẫn đếm.' This keeps Bảo in character as someone who already knows and doesn't want to engage.
character_voice.note: All three speaking characters are immediately distinguishable without tags. Cường's data-driven fragments, Bảo's truncated warnings, and Hạnh's interrogative traps all match their voice profiles precisely.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The sensory deprivation of the real world (taste loss, noise chaos) is stated rather than shown through a specific, surprising detail.
plants_seeded.fix: Replace the general statement about taste with a concrete action: 'Anh nhai. Lưỡi không phân biệt được bánh mì và vỏ bao bì. Cả hai đều là carbonhydrate.'
plants_seeded.note: The reverse-transmission concept is seeded naturally through Hạnh's dialogue and Cường's technical analysis. The growing bruise is tracked without being over-explained. The hoa sữa/ozon dichotomy is established as a recurring motif.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Mọi thứ đều chạy. Mọi thứ đều đúng. Vậy tại sao vết bầm vẫn lớn lên.
prose_quality.fix: This reads as a generic rhetorical question. Make it specific to Cường's voice: 'Mọi thứ chạy. Ping 14. Nhiễu 0.3%. Vết bầm: +2mm so với hôm qua. Không khớp.'
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Hoa sữa. Nồng. Ngọt. Ngột ngạt. / Mở mắt. Ozon. Cồn. Kim loại.
prose_quality.note: The sentence rhythm variation is excellent—fragments, run-ons, and technical lists create a distinctive cadence. The weakest sentences are the few that drift toward generic internal monologue rather than staying in Cường's clinical register.

continuity.note: Perfect continuity from Ch 1. The bruise, the data log, the sensory details (ozon, cồn, kim loại), and Cường's physical state all carry over seamlessly. The emotional state (detachment eroding into unease) progresses naturally.

canon_compliance.note: No violations found. All character descriptions, locations, technical details, and established facts align with the world bible and character registry.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The explanation of the Neural Mantle's bidirectional signal flow ('mô hình yêu cầu-phản hồi') borders on info-dump, even though it's integrated into Cường's internal analysis.
lore_integration.fix: Break the technical explanation across more fragmented thoughts, or have Cường check the system logs instead of reciting the architecture: 'Cường mở log. Tín hiệu ra: bình thường. Tín hiệu vào: bình thường. Nguồn phát thứ ba: null. Null. Null. Vậy tại sao—'
lore_integration.note: The worldbuilding is active—the ping rate, the sensory deprivation, the Cumberland Tunnel backstory, and the legal framework all drive the plot forward rather than decorating it.

engagement.weakest_moment: The opening breakfast scene, while effective for voice establishment, is the lowest-tension section and could lose impatient readers before Bảo's warning raises the stakes.
engagement.fix: Interleave the breakfast with a micro-flashback to the previous night's anomaly—a brief, intrusive sensory detail from the virtual world that disrupts the real-world routine.
engagement.note: The chapter builds tension expertly through three escalating warnings (Bảo's 'Dừng đi', Hạnh's interrogation, the 'Nó biết tôi ở đâu' revelation). The final image of Cường waiting for nightfall is genuinely unsettling.

three_weakest_sentences: Mọi thứ đều chạy. Mọi thứ đều đúng. Vậy tại sao vết bầm vẫn lớn lên.
Cường xoay câu hỏi trong đầu, xoay như cuộn cáp trong tay lúc nãy, kiểm tra mọi góc độ.
Thế giới thực đầy tiếng ồn.
three_strongest_sentences: Hoa sữa. Nồng. Ngọt. Ngột ngạt. / Mở mắt. Ozon. Cồn. Kim loại.
Người đó nói: 'Nó biết tôi ở đâu.'
Vết bầm nóng dưới ngón tay. Hoặc da anh lạnh, nên vết bầm cảm giác nóng. Hoặc cả hai đều lạnh, và cái nóng chỉ là ký ức của cái chạm từ đêm qua — áp suất môi, 36.8°C, hằng số.
ai_patterns_detected: Slight paragraph-structure uniformity in the middle section (observation → action → reflection pattern repeats)
One instance of the 'X. Y. Z.' rhetorical triplet ('Mọi thứ đều chạy. Mọi thứ vẫn chờ. Mọi thứ vẫn đúng.') which is a common AI rhythm
The internal monologue occasionally explains what was already shown through action
top_3_revisions: Cut or fragment the technical info-dump about signal architecture (around 'Truyền ngược. Dữ liệu trong hệ thống...') into shorter, more clinical observations mixed with system-log readings
Replace the generic rhetorical questions ('Vậy tại sao vết bầm vẫn lớn lên') with specific data contradictions in Cường's voice ('Vết bầm: +2mm. Ping: 14ms. Không khớp.')

Add one moment where Cường's clinical mask slips entirely—a physical reaction he doesn't analyze, a sensory detail that overwhelms his numbering system, or a memory fragment that breaks through without context
new_canon_entries: Cường's hầm has a metal door (sơn xám) with a visible light strip from the corridor underneath
Building elevator has been broken since before Cường moved in; stairs are 14 steps to floor 1, then 12 to ground
Bảo's workspace is on the second floor of an old parking structure, accessible by concrete stairs
Cường carries cash exclusively—no cards, no digital transfers, no trace
Hạnh reveals a previous victim died in Cumberland Tunnel saying 'Nó biết tôi ở đâu'
Cường plans to use temporal lobe sensors to monitor his own brain activity during the next dive
